Package neqsim.process.equipment.compressor

package neqsim.process.equipment.compressor

    Description

    Driver models for rotating equipment (compressors, pumps, etc.).
  • Class
    Description
    AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem
    Screening-level advanced anti-surge control utilities for centrifugal compressor studies.
    AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem.CertificationStatus
    Certification status for the implemented public screening methods.
    AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem.ControlAlgorithm
    Anti-surge controller algorithm selection.
    AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem.DualRecycleValveCommand
    Dual recycle valve command.
    AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem.FaultTolerantDecision
    Fault-tolerant anti-surge decision.
    AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem.InstrumentSignal
    Validated transmitter signal.
    AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem.InvariantMapPoint
    Fan-law invariant map point.
    AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem.RecycleSizingResult
    Recycle sizing result.
    AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem.RecycleValveRole
    Algorithm used for valve split in the dual recycle architecture.
    AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem.ReducedCoordinatePoint
    Reduced anti-surge coordinate point.
    AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem.SensorFault
    Sensor fault types supported by the embedded instrumentation model.
    AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem.SurgeOscillationState
    Lumped educational surge-oscillation model state.
    AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem.VotingMode
    Voting rule for redundant transmitter signals.
    AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem.VotingResult
    Voting result for redundant instrumentation.
    AntiSurge
    AntiSurge class for compressor surge protection in dynamic simulations.
    AntiSurge.ControlStrategy
    Enum for anti-surge control strategies.
    AntiSurgeRecycleCalculator
    Steady-state anti-surge recycle calculator for a charted Compressor.
    AntiSurgeRecycleCalculator.Result
    Immutable result of an anti-surge recycle calculation.
    BoundaryCurve
    Abstract base implementation for compressor limit curves such as surge and stone wall curves.
    BoundaryCurveInterface
    Common interface for compressor limit curves such as surge and stone wall curves.
    Compressor
    Compressor class.
    Compressor.Builder
    Builder class for constructing Compressor instances with a fluent API.
    CompressorAntiSurgeApplication
    Commercial-style compressor anti-surge application design and simulation layer.
    CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.ApplicationStatus
    Application scan quality.
    CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.CertificationStatus
    Certification status for this open simulation implementation.
    CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.CheckStatus
    Commissioning check verdict.
    CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.CommissioningCheck
    Commissioning check.
    CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.CommissioningReport
    Commissioning report.
    CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.HeaderApplication
    Shared header anti-surge coordination configuration.
    CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.HeaderDecision
    Header-level scan decision.
    CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.OperatingMode
    Application operating mode.
    CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.OperatorDiagnostic
    Operator-facing diagnostic.
    CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.ScanInput
    Scan input for all stages.
    CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.ScanResult
    Scan result.
    CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.SequenceState
    Startup/shutdown sequence state.
    CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.StageApplication
    Stage-level anti-surge application configuration.
    CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.StageDecision
    Stage-level scan decision.
    CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.StageScanInput
    Stage scan input.
    CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.TopologyBinding
    Real NeqSim topology binding for one compressor anti-surge stage.
    CompressorChart
    CompressorChart class.
    CompressorChartAlternativeMapLookup
    CompressorChartAlternativeMapLookup class.
    CompressorChartAlternativeMapLookupExtrapolate
    CompressorChartAlternativeMapLookupExtrapolate class.
    CompressorChartCalibrator
    Utility to calibrate a compressor performance chart from field data.
    CompressorChartGenerator
    Compressor chart generator.
    CompressorChartInterface
    CompressorChartInterface interface.
    CompressorChartJsonReader
    Reader for compressor chart data from JSON files.
    CompressorChartKhader2015
    CompressorChartKhader2015 is a class that implements the compressor chart calculations based on the Kader 2015 method.
    CompressorChartKhader2015.CorrectedCurve
    Simple POJO to hold corrected (dimensionless) compressor curve data for a given speed.
    CompressorChartKhader2015.RealCurve
    Simple POJO to hold real (physical units) compressor curve data for a given speed.
    CompressorChartMWInterpolation
    Compressor chart with multiple performance maps at different molecular weights.
    CompressorChartMWInterpolation.InterpolationIndices
    Internal class to hold interpolation indices and fraction.
    CompressorChartReader
    CompressorChartReader class.
    CompressorConstraintConfig
    Configuration class for compressor operational constraints.
    CompressorCurve
    CompressorCurve class.
    CompressorCurveCorrections
    Utility class providing correction factors for centrifugal compressor performance curves.
    CompressorCurveTemplate
    Template class for storing normalized compressor curve data.
    CompressorDriver
    Models the driver (motor, turbine, engine) for a compressor.
    CompressorEventListener
    Listener interface for compressor events in dynamic simulations.
    CompressorInterface
    CompressorInterface interface.
    CompressorMechanicalLosses
    Models mechanical losses and seal gas consumption for centrifugal compressors.
    CompressorMechanicalLosses.BearingType
    Bearing type enumeration.
    CompressorMechanicalLosses.SealType
    Seal type enumeration.
    CompressorOperatingHistory
    Records and tracks compressor operating history for analysis and trending.
    CompressorOperatingHistory.OperatingPoint
    Inner class representing a single operating point.
    CompressorPropertyProfile
    CompressorPropertyProfile class.
    CompressorState
    Enumeration representing the operating states of a compressor in dynamic simulations.
    CompressorTrain
    Composite equipment representing a single compressor stage (train).
    CompressorWashing
    Models compressor washing (online and offline) for performance recovery.
    CompressorWashing.FoulingType
    Fouling type affecting compressor.
    CompressorWashing.WashEvent
    Record of a wash event.
    CompressorWashing.WashingMethod
    Compressor washing method types.
    DriverType
    Enum representing different types of compressor drivers.
    DryGasSealAnalyzer
    High-level analysis module for dry gas seal condensation risk assessment in centrifugal compressors.
    OperatingEnvelope
    Operating envelope for compressor performance tracking.
    ReciprocatingCompressorPerformance
    Screening-level reciprocating compressor performance calculator following API 618 conventions.
    SafeSplineStoneWallCurve
    Spline based representation of the stone wall curve with safe extrapolation.
    SafeSplineSurgeCurve
    Spline based implementation of the surge curve with safe extrapolation.
    ShutdownProfile
    Defines a shutdown profile for compressor shutdown sequences.
    ShutdownProfile.ProfilePoint
    Inner class representing a point in the shutdown profile.
    ShutdownProfile.ShutdownType
    Enum for shutdown types.
    StartupProfile
    Defines a startup profile for compressor startup sequences.
    StartupProfile.ProfilePoint
    Inner class representing a point in the startup profile.
    StoneWallCurve
    StoneWallCurve defines the compressor stone wall (choke) limit.
    SurgeCurve
    SurgeCurve defines the compressor surge limit.
    TurboMachineryChartLibrary
    Curated library of reference turbomachinery performance maps shipped with NeqSim.
